(born 24 December 1977 in [Piteşti](/wiki/Pite%C5%9Fti "Piteşti"), [Argeş](/wiki/Arge%C8%99_County "Argeș County")) is a former [Romanian](/wiki/Romania "Romania") footballer.

**Cristian Nicolae Bratu** (born 24 December 1977 in [Piteşti](/wiki/Pite%C5%9Fti "Piteşti"), [Argeş](/wiki/Arge%C8%99_County "Argeș County")) is a former [Romanian](/wiki/Romania "Romania") footballer.
